code:
import io
import string

fn ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 11 or b == 12 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn str_eq(_ a: String, _ b: String) -> Bool
  let la = string.len(a)
  let lb = string.len(b)
  if la != lb
    false
  else
    mut i = 0
    mut equal = true
    while i < la and equal
      match string.byte_at(a, i)
      when Some(x)
        match string.byte_at(b, i)
        when Some(y)
          if x != y
            equal = false
          end
        when None
          equal = false
        end
      when None
        equal = false
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    equal
  end
end

fn seen_before(_ s: String, _ limit: Int, _ tok: String) -> Bool
  mut j = 0
  mut found = false
  while j < limit and not found
    while j < limit and ws(s, j)
      j = j + 1
    end
    if j < limit
      let a = j
      while j < limit and not ws(s, j)
        j = j + 1
      end
      let b = j
      let t = string.substring(s, a, b)
      if str_eq(t, tok)
        found = true
      end
    end
  end
  found
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  while i < n and ws(input, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let start = i
    while i < n and not ws(input, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let stop = i
    let token = string.substring(input, start, stop)
    if not seen_before(input, start, token)
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
